examples: The hem allowance is the width between the hemline and the hem edge.
Center Back Length - Measure from the centre back of your neck to your hemline.
The skirt hemline should be at or below your knee to slim and lengthen your look.
That the shoulders of men may uphold heaven, but the hemline of heaven brushes the earth.
Sometimes, Ms. Azria will wear a longer dress or skirt but accentuate her legs with an asymmetrical hemline or dramatic slits.
